title: Ubiquiti PowerBeam M5 400, PBE-M5-400
description: Ubiquiti PBE-M5-400 is a powerful completely outdoor unit including 2x 25dBi (2x2 MIMO) antennas for the 5GHz band as a PtP or PtMP solution. The unit allows transmission speed up to 300Mbps . Inside PowerBeam is a powerful MIPS processor Atheros 74KC with 560MHz frequency, 64MB RAM DDR2 memory and 8MB of Flash memory . Unit has also one ethernet port supports 10/100/1000Mbps speed, and Gigabit passive PoE 24V / 0.5A (802.3af PoE is not supported).
